Business: Uravi Defence and Technology Limited manufactures and sells wedge and various types of lamps for automobiles in India. The company provides incandescent and halogen head lamps; stop, tail, and indicator signal lamps; wedge base lamps; wedge base lamps holders and silicon caps; and LED filament lamps for use in two-wheelers, three-wheelers, passenge…

  Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

  Current: 16.64  (-2.40% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
